{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lindon's Dross
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's Dross]] can manifest as a red entity.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's Dross]] can communicate via text/thought.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
